trans-unit.source: API key for authenticating with the dashboard (optional, for dashboards with API key authentication)
trans-unit.target: API key for authenticating with the dashboard (optional, for dashboards with API key authentication)

trans-unit.source: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The dashboard at '{0}' does not have the telemetry API enabled.
trans-unit.target: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The dashboard at '{0}' does not have the telemetry API enabled.

trans-unit.source: Start the dashboard with 'aspire dashboard run' or set Dashboard:Api:Enabled to true.
trans-unit.target: Start the dashboard with 'aspire dashboard run' or set Dashboard:Api:Enabled to true.

trans-unit.source: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. Authentication failed.
trans-unit.target: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. Authentication failed.

trans-unit.source: Alternatively, allow anonymous access with 'aspire dashboard run --allow-anonymous' or by setting the ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS environment variable to true.
trans-unit.target: Alternatively, allow anonymous access with 'aspire dashboard run --allow-anonymous' or by setting the ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS environment variable to true.

trans-unit.source: Authenticate with the dashboard either with a --dashboard-url including a valid login token (e.g. http://localhost:18888/login?t=TOKEN), or with an --api-key matching the dashboard's configured API key.
trans-unit.target: Authenticate with the dashboard either with a --dashboard-url including a valid login token (e.g. http://localhost:18888/login?t=TOKEN), or with an --api-key matching the dashboard's configured API key.

trans-unit.source: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. Unable to connect to '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. Unable to connect to '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Verify the dashboard is running and the URL is correct.
trans-unit.target: Verify the dashboard is running and the URL is correct.

trans-unit.source: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The login token in the URL is invalid or expired.
trans-unit.target: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The login token in the URL is invalid or expired.

trans-unit.source: Alternatively, allow anonymous access with 'aspire dashboard run --allow-anonymous' or by setting the ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS environment variable to true.
trans-unit.target: Alternatively, allow anonymous access with 'aspire dashboard run --allow-anonymous' or by setting the ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS environment variable to true.

trans-unit.source: Ensure you are using the login URL from the currently running dashboard instance.
trans-unit.target: Ensure you are using the login URL from the currently running dashboard instance.

trans-unit.source: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The dashboard is not available.
trans-unit.target: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The dashboard is not available.

trans-unit.source: Ensure the AppHost is running with the dashboard enabled.
trans-unit.target: Ensure the AppHost is running with the dashboard enabled.

trans-unit.source: The --dashboard-url and --apphost options cannot be used together. Specify one or the other.
trans-unit.target: The --dashboard-url and --apphost options cannot be used together. Specify one or the other.

trans-unit.source: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The value '{0}' is not a valid URL.
trans-unit.target: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The value '{0}' is not a valid URL.

trans-unit.source: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The specified URL '{0}' does not appear to be a valid dashboard address.
trans-unit.target: Could not fetch telemetry data from the dashboard. The specified URL '{0}' does not appear to be a valid dashboard address.

trans-unit.source: Base URL of a standalone Aspire Dashboard (e.g. http://localhost:18888). Login URLs are also accepted and automatically normalized.
trans-unit.target: Base URL of a standalone Aspire Dashboard (e.g. http://localhost:18888). Login URLs are also accepted and automatically normalized.

trans-unit.source: View OpenTelemetry data (logs, spans, traces) from a running AppHost
trans-unit.target: Zeigen Sie Telemetriedaten (Protokolle, Spans, Traces) einer laufenden Aspire-Anwendung an.

trans-unit.source: The --file option cannot be used with --dashboard-url, --api-key, or --apphost. Specify either an archive file or a live dashboard source.
trans-unit.target: The --file option cannot be used with --dashboard-url, --api-key, or --apphost. Specify either an archive file or a live dashboard source.

trans-unit.source: Stream telemetry in real-time as it arrives
trans-unit.target: Streamen Sie Telemetriedaten in Echtzeit, sobald sie eintreffen.

trans-unit.source: Group span statistics by Name or Resource
trans-unit.target: Group span statistics by Name or Resource

trans-unit.source: Filter by error status (true to show only errors, false to exclude errors)
trans-unit.target: Filtern Sie nach Fehlerstatus (true, um nur Fehler anzuzeigen; false, um Fehler auszuschließen).

trans-unit.source: The --limit value must be a positive number.
trans-unit.target: Der Wert für --limit muss eine positive Zahl sein.

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of items to return
View structured logs from the Dashboard telemetry API
trans-unit.target: Zeigen Sie strukturierte Protokolle aus der Dashboard-Telemetrie-API an.

trans-unit.source: Search and filter telemetry fields such as log messages, attribute values, names, source, and IDs. Supports full-text search and field filters. See https://aka.ms/aspire/cli-search for more details
trans-unit.target: Search and filter telemetry fields such as log messages, attribute values, names, source, and IDs. Supports full-text search and field filters. See https://aka.ms/aspire/cli-search for more details

trans-unit.source: Filter logs by minimum severity (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical)
trans-unit.target: Filtern Sie Protokolle nach minimaler Schwere (Trace, Debug, Information, Warnung, Fehler, Kritisch).

trans-unit.source: Show top traces by wall-clock duration
trans-unit.target: Show top traces by wall-clock duration

trans-unit.source: View spans from the Dashboard telemetry API
trans-unit.target: Zeigen Sie Bereiche aus der Dashboard-Telemetrie-API an.

trans-unit.source: Summarize trace latency, span counts, and errors
trans-unit.target: Summarize trace latency, span counts, and errors

trans-unit.source: Telemetry archive file '{0}' was not found.
trans-unit.target: Telemetry archive file '{0}' was not found.

trans-unit.source: Read telemetry from an Aspire export or profile archive instead of a running dashboard
trans-unit.target: Read telemetry from an Aspire export or profile archive instead of a running dashboard

trans-unit.source: The --top value must be a positive number.
trans-unit.target: The --top value must be a positive number.

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of rows to display
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of rows to display

trans-unit.source: The trace ID to view. If not specified, lists all traces.
trans-unit.target: Die anzuzeigende Trace-ID. Wenn keine angegeben wird, werden alle Traces aufgelistet.

trans-unit.source: Trace with ID '{0}' was not found.
trans-unit.target: Ablaufverfolgung mit der ID „{0}“ wurde nicht gefunden.

trans-unit.source: View traces from the Dashboard telemetry API
trans-unit.target: Zeigen Sie Ablaufverfolgungen aus der Dashboard-Telemetrie-API an.

trans-unit.source: Dashboard API returned unexpected content type '{0}'. Expected JSON response.
trans-unit.target: Dashboard API returned unexpected content type '{0}'. Expected JSON response.

trans-unit.source: Analyze trace wall-clock time, span coverage, gaps, and overlap
trans-unit.target: Analyze trace wall-clock time, span coverage, gaps, and overlap
